title: Updating fields, variables, or watch values
breadcrumbs: Updating fields, variables, or watch values
text: Updating fields, variables, or watch values Update watch fields, variables, or values. In one of the following locations, double-click the field, variable, or watch. Alternatively, highlight the item, right-click, and choose Edit . Watches pane of the debugger main window Locals pane of the debugger main window Structure pane of the browser window. Change the Value and click Apply . The value of an item in the Edit window is synchronized with the value in another pane only when you highlight the item name in one of the panes. Optionally, click another item name to edit its value. Click Close to apply the change and close the window. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
